prompt: Give me a short pep talk before I start a hard task I have been putting off all morning.
response:
Alright, deep breath! You know this task is hanging over you like a gloomy cloud. It's time to kick that cloud away! You've got this.

Stop thinking about how hard it is and start focusing on just ONE small step. Maybe it's just opening the document, or writing one sentence. Once you get going, you'll build momentum.

Remember how good it feels to conquer something you've been avoiding?  You'll feel amazing afterwards.  

You're capable, you're strong, and you deserve to get this done. Okay, enough pep talk!  Go get it done. Just start! You got this!
